description: Elena, acting on Coulson’s orders, goes to Talbot’s cell to extract him as part of the evacuation. Talbot expresses guilt and a desire to fix things, but Elena is wary, uncertain if he is in control of himself or might again be a Hydra pawn. She keeps Talbot under strict watch, the situation fraught with tension and suspicion.

transcript.line: Come on, Glenn. Just think. Just think. You can fix this. You can fix this. Just think. Just think. Just think. Just think. Speedy!
Don't. Back up. Bad aliens are coming, and we're getting out. Coulson's orders. Come on.

Oh, sorry. I can't do that. I caused this problem. You give me a gun, I'll help take out as many of them as I can. Better yet, you know what you do? You get me a phone, and I'll call in an air strike.
But there's no way to call out.
Then I'll send up a smoke signal.
Okay. Look, there's no need for that. We're fine. That's not necessary, because I'll comply. I'll... That's a bad choice of words. I'll cooperate.
I'm gonna make up for what I did. Make it right for that little girl. Robin and her... her mother.
I believe you but we don't know if you're the one in control.
So you follow my lead. (in Spanish) Understand?
